description:
Super Bright IP65 Waterproof 5050 SMD Module Light Sign Strip Lamp DC 12V

 

Application :

 

1.Commercial Advertisement Signs Backlight.

 

2.Backlight store front light

 

3.Advertisement Light Box Backlight & Decoration.sign

 

4.Ideal replacement of incandescent and fluorescent lights

 

5.LOGO advertising billboard,exposed luminous characters

 

6.Suitable for Boat cabin & deck lighting,stair, kitchen ,courtesy,caravan,garden etc.

 

Note :

1: 20pcs led module each string , they can also be cut off on customer's requirement ,

Be sure you cut the connect line between the strip.

2: The controller and power supply is not included, we we do not

take responsibility for the installation, Highly recommended for professionals to purchase.

 

 

Specification :

 

Type: 3 LED 5050 module

Material: PVC plastic

LED quantity:3SMD each strip

Standard cascade:20 strip one set

Beam angle:120°

Wat erproof level:IP65

Working voltage:DC 12V

Power:0.25W / each led

 

Package included :

 

1 x 10ft module light set
